title: crepis micrantha
intro: Crepis micrantha, also known as the small dandelion or little hawk's beard, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of liver and gallbladder issues. Crepis micrantha has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving blood circulation, and acting as a natural diuretic. The herbal preparations of Crepis micrantha include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
